krang-planner.description: Analyzes PR and JIRA to produce ranked mutation candidates

krang-executor.description: Applies a single mutation patch, builds, runs tests, reports outcome

krang-replanner.description: Given prior results, generates next batch of mutation candidates avoiding duplicates

krang-plan.description: Run the mutation planner on the current PR
krang-plan.prompt: Run the krang-planner subagent to analyze the current PR diff and JIRA context, then produce ranked mutation candidates. Pass all relevant context (git log, git diff, JIRA ticket text) in the task prompt.

krang-execute.description: Execute a specific mutation by ID
krang-execute.prompt: Run the krang-executor subagent with the specified mutation candidate JSON. Apply the patch, build, run tests, and report the outcome.

krang-replan.description: Replan mutations based on prior results
krang-replan.prompt: Run the krang-replanner subagent with prior state and latest results to generate the next batch of mutation candidates.

krang-run.description: Run a full mutation testing cycle: plan, execute, replan
krang-run.prompt: Run a complete mutation testing cycle. First run krang-planner to get candidates, then run krang-executor for each candidate, then run krang-replanner if needed. Report the full results.
